specification:
Type: MicroSim **sim-id:** seasonal-care-calendar
**Library:** p5.js
**Status:** Specified An interactive circular calendar showing moss care tasks by season: **Visual:** - A circular diagram divided into 12 months, grouped by season (color-coded) - Spring (March-May): light green - Summer (June-August): deep green - Autumn (September-November): golden/amber - Winter (December-February): cool blue/gray - Each month segment contains icons representing care tasks - A central moss illustration that changes appearance by season (lush green in spring/summer, bronze in autumn, dormant brown/white in winter) **Interaction:** - Click a month to expand it and show detailed task descriptions - Hover over task icons for tooltips explaining each task - "Animate Year" button that rotates through all 12 months, showing the moss changing and tasks appearing **Controls:** - Climate zone selector (humid continental, humid subtropical, oceanic, Mediterranean) that adjusts task timing - Toggle between Northern and Southern hemisphere Canvas: responsive width, 500px height Color scheme: seasonal palette as described above **Learning objective:** (L3 — Apply) Students can create a maintenance plan for a moss garden appropriate to their climate zone and season. Implementation: p5.js with polar coordinate layout and interactive month selection
